title.rendered: ASP.NET and MSSQL Developer / Database Administrator

content.rendered:
Experience: Minimum 3 years

Job Description:

Are you a seasoned ASP.NET and MSSQL developer/ Database Administrator with a passion for creating robust web applications? We’re looking for a talented individual to join our team at Giridhar Eye Institute. As a developer with at least 5 years of experience, you’ll play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining our web applications.

Requirements:

  • A minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience with ASP.NET and MSSQL.
  • Proficiency in C# and SQL.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Knowledge of web application security best practices.
  • Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
  • Any relevant certifications are a plus.
